subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1914-03-30
subcodes.first_line: From 8am to 6pm I was speaking to them. They asked many questions peculiar to their sects... Now the answer must be given in such a manner as to establish a conciliation between these two schools
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @modes; manner; speed; size of divine revelation, @Islamic rituals; holy days; practices; etc., @realms of being; three realms; five realms, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics
